{{Quote|A few Sector Commands have attempted to overtly assault garrisons, or besiege them in remote areas, and they ended in worse than failure—they were slaughters.|Viran Qol|<ref name="Imperial Garrison">{{JournalCite|12|Imperial Garrisons}}</ref>}}
'''Viran Qol''' was an [[Alliance Special Forces/Legends|Alliance SpecForce]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] who was considered an expert on [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] fortifications. He lectured on Imperial [[Garrison/Legends|garrison]] design and tactics at the hidden [[Alliance Officer's Candidate School]].<ref name="Imperial Garrison" />

Qol graduated from a civil engineering program the day before his [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] was subjugated by the Empire. Days later, he joined the local resistance, which later became part of the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].<ref name="Imperial Garrison" />

==Behind the scenes==
Viran Qol's name is misspelled as "Qiran Vol" on the back cover of ''Star Wars Adventure Journal 12''.<ref name="Imperial Garrison" />
